name: io.github.jonradoff/mcplens
description: Read-only admin MCP server for MCPLens — dashboards, users, tenants, billing, logs, health.

environmentVariables.name: MCPLENS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the MCPLens instance (e.g., https://your-app.fly.dev or http://localhost:4290)

environmentVariables.name: MCPLENS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Root-tenant API key with admin authority. Create in Admin → API Keys.
